# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 229.248 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.5167
  biquad b0=1.00170974604 b1=-1.99148688631 b2=0.990001330648 a1=-1.99148688631 a2=0.991711076684

  biquad b0=1.01365309446 b1=-1.92165055644 b2=0.920156108431 a1=-1.92165055644 a2=0.933809202889

  biquad b0=1.00060637534 b1=-1.99700932436 b2=0.996453890559 a1=-1.99700932436 a2=0.997060265903
